pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh where PROJECT_DIR is defined and created.
Verified in setup_task.sh within the generated legacy_server.py script.
Verified in setup_task.sh within the generated app.py and docker-compose.yml.
Verified in setup_task.sh within the generated app.py where BACKEND_URL is defined.
Verified in setup_task.sh within the generated legacy_server.py response payload.

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically sets up a legacy backend server running on the host machine at port 4567, serving a JSON payload containing the string 'Legacy Core Online'. It also generates a frontend Flask application running on port 8080 in a Docker container inside the project directory '/home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/migration-task'. The frontend app is hardcoded to connect to the backend using the hostname 'backend.legacy.internal'.
